mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_device_group(tenant_id, org_id, group_key, name, description, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{groupKey}, #{name}, #{description}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_device_group WHERE group_key = #{groupKey} AND is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1

sql.where:
AND is_delete = 0
AND group_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupKey}, '%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM iot_device_group
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_device_group SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE group_key = #{groupKey} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_device_group SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE group_key = #{groupKey} AND is_delete = 0
